justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently understood and accurately queried the user's time preferences, including the 'perhaps later' and 'earlier in the week' requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives and offered a good range of options, though it sometimes suggested checking for 'other times' on the same day after already checking a broad afternoon window.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was generally efficient, but there was a slight redundancy in suggesting 'other times on Tuesday, June 2nd' after already checking a 4 PM to 8 PM window.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone despite repeated unavailability.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well from unavailability, maintaining context and expanding the search intelligently, though it occasionally re-suggested checking the same day after a broad search had already yielded no results.
